```python
import requests

headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36'}

# 尝试多个可能包含CFO信息的页面
urls = [
    "https://www.airbnb.com/about/about-us",
    "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Airbnb",
    "https://investors.airbnb.com/management/default.aspx"
]

for url in urls:
    try:
        resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=15)
        print(f"\n=== {url} ===")
        print(f"Status: {resp.status_code}")
        text = resp.text.lower()
        # 搜索CFO相关内容
        if 'cfo' in text:
            idx = text.find('cfo')
            print(f"Found CFO at position {idx}")
            print(resp.text[max(0, idx-100):idx+300])
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"{url}: Error - {e}")
```

<summary>
[执行中] 尝试使用Python代码直接请求获取Airbnb CFO信息</summary>



```python
import urllib.request
import ssl

# 尝试获取Airbnb About页面
url = "https://www.airbnb.com/about"

try:
    context = ssl.create_default_context()
    context.check_hostname = False
    context.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE
    
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
    response = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15, context=context)
    content = response.read().decode('utf-8')
    
    # 搜索CFO相关内容
    if 'CFO' in content or 'Chief Financial Officer' in content:
        # 提取CFO附近的内容
        import re
        cfo_match = re.search(r'.{0,200}CFO.{0,200}', content, re.IGNORECASE | re.DOTALL)
        if cfo_match:
            print("Found CFO info:")
            print(cfo_match.group())
        else:
            print("CFO keyword found but no context")
            print(content[:3000])
    else:
        print("No CFO found in about page")
        print(content[:2000])
        
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error: {e}")
```
</tool_use>
